command:
# Check if media_bridge.py is still running and capture any error info
$proc = Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -like '*media*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' }; if (-not $proc) { $proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine, CreationDate; Write-Output '=== media_bridge processes ==='; $proc | Format-List }; Write-Output '=== Checking for .env file ==='; if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\.env') { Get-Content 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\.env' } else { Write-Output '.env file not found in media-pipeline' }; Write-Output '=== Checking media_bridge.py stderr redirect ==='; Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*media_bridge*' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List
description: Check media_bridge.py process status and .env configuration for errors
